# Feature: MVE Live WPM Preview & Scene Shrink

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-10 -->

## Intent

While typing dialog text, MVE text blocks should resize immediately from WPM (not only after 800ms save). Content-driven audio scenes should shrink to fit the combined text-block width when text is shortened or empty shells are removed — not only grow.

Roadmap: MVE Slice 1 (Stufe B) — follow-up `mve-textblock-scene-layout.md`

## Preconditions

- Local desktop, audio project, dialog lane with MVE text block(s)
- Scene wider than current text content (legacy grow-only state)

## Happy Path

- [ ] Typing in textarea updates text block pixel width before debounced save
- [ ] After debounced save (800ms), pink scene shell shrinks when text is short
- [ ] Opening project with oversized scene + short text triggers reconcile shrink

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Multiple blocks in scene: draft on one line recalculates stacked spans for preview
- [ ] Film project: no content-driven shrink (policy unchanged)

## Regression

- [ ] Scene still grows when long text / stacked blocks exceed shell
- [ ] Debounced persist still saves at 800ms
- [ ] `mve-textblock-order-sync` Playwright harness green

## Assumptions

- Scene sync while typing uses same 800ms debounce as save (not every keystroke to backend)
- In-scene horizontal DnD reorder remains out of scope (T32 cross-scene only)

## Screenshots

| Step | Filename |
|------|----------|
| 1 | `01-live-wpm-width-while-typing.png` |
| 2 | `02-scene-shrunk-after-short-text.png` |

## Implementation Notes

- Live WPM: `onDraftTextChange` in editor → `resolveMveLineVisualSpanMapWithDraft` resizes block immediately
- Scene shrink: `reconcileMveSceneDurations` + debounced `syncSceneForDraftLine` (800ms) call `resizeSceneForContent` for grow and shrink
- Tests: `sync-scene-duration-for-mve-content.test.ts`
- Out of scope: in-scene horizontal DnD reorder (T32 cross-scene only)
